_enabled: Master switch — when false, this plugin is skipped during indexing and PDF files are not indexed.
_extensions: File extensions this plugin claims (lower-case, leading dot).
_max_file_size_bytes: Skip PDF files larger than this many bytes (default 50 MB) to keep indexing snappy on huge documents.
_extract_pages: Index each page's text as a `page` node.
_extract_outline: Walk the PDF's bookmark/outline tree and emit each entry as a section node.
_extract_metadata: Pull document-level metadata (Title, Author, Subject, Keywords) into a `frontmatter` node.
_decrypt_with_empty_password: Try decrypting password-protected PDFs with an empty password (handles the common case where a PDF is technically encrypted but no password was set).
_ignore_dirs: Folder names the indexer skips when this plugin is enabled.
_ignore_files: Glob patterns for files the indexer should skip.
_ignore_dir_markers: Sentinel file names that mark an entire directory as ignorable.
